run_purpose: Observe Excel spreadsheet semantic extraction; not pass/fail product proof.

cases.expected_behavior: Multiple sheets; formula_cells > 0; formula_types include SUM, IF, VLOOKUP; charts_detected; table_count > 0; cross_sheet_references; conditional_logic_detected; evidence_type spreadsheet_semantic.

cases.expected_behavior: Numeric/text values only; formula_cells 0; spreadsheet_noise_flags includes values_without_formulas.
Formulas with error signals (=1/0 or #REF!); formula_errors_detected noise flag; formula_error_cells > 0.
Charts present; formula_cells 0; charts_without_formulas noise flag.
Formulas reference other sheets (e.g. Data!A1); cross_sheet_references true; conditional_logic_detected (IF/COUNTIF).
